mapper.sql: id, name, credit_code, start_date, oper_name, status, address, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM jc_enterprise ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT e.id, e.name, e.credit_code, e.start_date, e.oper_name, e.status, e.address, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM jc_enterprise e JOIN zj_user_enterprise_relation r ON e.id = r.enterprise_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
